hints.title: Hint 1
hints.content: Can you convert a grid of 0s and 1s into a useful piece of data?

hints.title: Hint 2
hints.content:
Look in the top-left, top-right, and bottom-left corners. What do you notice?
Hint 2.2
Namely, look at the the top-left, top-right, and bottom-left $$$7 \times 7$$$ subgrids. They form a pattern. Have you seen this pattern elsewhere? (It is well-known.)

hints.title: Hint 2.2
hints.content: Namely, look at the the top-left, top-right, and bottom-left $$$7 \times 7$$$ subgrids. They form a pattern. Have you seen this pattern elsewhere? (It is well-known.)

solutions.title: Solution
solutions.content:
1952F - Grid
Replace 0 with white and 1 with black to get this QR code:
Scanning it tells you that you need to find the $$$4 \times 4$$$ grid with the maximum sum.
